REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION OF M. RYAN PINKSTON IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. IN OPPOSITION PLAINTIFF SUGGESTS, POINTING TO VAGUE AND CONCLUSORY ALLEGATIONS IN THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT, THAT ITS CLAIMS DEPEND ON (1) PAROL EVIDENCE/UNSPECIFIED REPRESENTATIONS MADE TO INDUCE PLAINTIFF TO ENTER INTO THE CONTRACT; (2) FACTS SURROUNDING DEFENDANT'S PURPORTED ACTS THAT PREVENTED PLAINTIFF FROM PERFORMING; HOWEVER NO SUCH FACTS ARE ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT (3) INTERPRETATION OF AMBIGUITIES IN THE CONTRACT; HOWEVER NO SUCH AMBIGUITIES ARE IDENTIFIED IN THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 21 DAYS FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO MAKE THE ALLEGATIONS REFERENCED IN THE OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF MAY ALLEGE ADDITIONAL CAUSES OF ACTION IF NEW ALLEGATIONS SUPPORT ANY NEW CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Ann Draper Esq., Draper Law Offices, 415-989-5620, via zoom for plaintiff
Ryan Pinkston Esq., Seyfarth Shaw LLP, 415-397-2823 via zoom for defendants MDF Facility LLC, 1215 Fell SF Owner LLC and 624 Stanyan SF Owner LLC

Mr. Pinkston contests the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FELL HOLDINGS LLC, STANYAN HOLDINGS LLC, MDF FACILITY LLC, 1215 FELL SF OWNER LLC, 624 STANYAN SF OWNER LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that demurrer is the proper mechanism to attack a stand-alone claim for declaratory relief as plaintiff is entitled to a declaration of its right, even if adverse. Defendant pointed to no defect with this cause of action other than Defendant's belief that the contract should be interpreted in Defendant's favor, no such determination is appropriate on a demurrer to the cause of action for declaratory relief. Cases cited by the defendant do not involve a stand-alone cause of action for declaratory relief.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
